inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
requests
| union dependencies
| summarize avgRequestDuration=avg(duration) by bin(timestamp, 1m) 
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
requests
| summarize requests = count(appId) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| render timechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
requests
| union dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(1h) 
//| where resultCode startswith "4" or resultCode startswith "5"
| where resultCode != "404"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1m), resultCode
| render piechart ;

content.Query:
requests
| union dependencies
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1m), resultCode
| render piechart ;

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
requests
| union dependencies
| where resultCode startswith "4" or resultCode startswith "5"
| where resultCode != "404"
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 10m), resultCode

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART1-COMPLETE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART2-COMPLETE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART3-COMPLETE"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactioncode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

content.Query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART1-COMPLETE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART2-COMPLETE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-PART3-COMPLETE"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactioncode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-REENFORCED-CREATE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-REENFORCED-REMOVE"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactioncode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-BORDERNOTIFICATION-CREATE" or customDimensions contains "IPAFFS-BORDERNOTIFICATION-REMOVE"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactioncode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where customDimensions contains "LOGIN"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactionCode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

content.Query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where customDimensions contains "LOGIN"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = Data.details.transactioncode
| summarize count() by startofday(timestamp), tostring(Details)
| order by timestamp desc
| render piechart

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = substring(Data.details.transactioncode,7)
| summarize count() by Details
| project Details, Count = count_

content.Query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = substring(Data.details.transactioncode,7)
| summarize count() by Details
| order by count_ desc
| project Details, Count = count_

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = substring(Data.details.transactioncode,7)
| project timestamp, Details, operation_Id, Data
| order by timestamp desc

inputs.name: Query
inputs.value:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = substring(Data.details.transactioncode,7)
| extend Priority = Data.priority
//| where Priority != "0"
| project timestamp, Details, operation_Id, Priority, Data
| order by timestamp desc

content.Query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions contains "IPAFFS"
| extend Data = todynamic(tostring(customDimensions.data))
| extend Details = substring(Data.details.transactioncode,7)
| extend Priority = Data.priority
| where Priority != "0"
| project timestamp, Details, operation_Id, Priority, Data
| order by timestamp desc
